headline: Conagra Brands (CAG) Could Be 4% Undervalued As Dividend Cut Resets The Outlook
summary: Conagra Brands (CAG) is back in focus after new leadership paired a sharp dividend cut with weaker fiscal 2027 earnings guidance, following large non cash impairment charges that produced a quarterly net loss.
